rulings.Case Title: TRUST CREATED UNDER THE WILL OF ABRAHAM L. GUMP
rulings.Calendar Matter: Petition For Order Accepting Resignation Of Trustee And Appointing Successor Trustee
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 8/12/19 - 1. The caption does not include the requested relief re consolidation of Petitioner's derivative shares with her subtrust. If Petitioner wishes to proceed with this request, an Amendment must be filed with notice to all interested parties. Please contact Examiner if more time will be required for notice. 2. If Petitioner plans to proceed with this request, please provide more information re Petitioner's request to consolidate her interests in the other subtrusts with her current subtrust and legal authority to do so. Endorsed-filed copies of all documents must be received in Room 202 by 8/5/19.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF SOO MI MUI CHAN
rulings.Calendar Matter: ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: FINAL DISTRIBUTION
rulings.Rulings: continued to august 5, 2019. an amended petition was filed 7/12/19, for which 15 days notice is required, given only AFTER the amended petition was filed. the POS of the NOH filed shows notice mailed 7/1/19, which is not proper. new notice must be mailed no later than 7/21/19 and the amended NOH and POS filed no later than monday, 7/29/19. by noon on that same day, a file stamped hard copy of the amended petition and proposed order must be delivered to the probate examiner in Room 202.
